message:
refactor(mcp): replace wildcard imports with explicit imports in helpers and missions

Continue the wildcard import elimination across MCP modules:

- mcp_helpers.rs: replace use super::* with explicit imports of
  CapabilityResolution, IpcPaneState, McpEnvelope, McpReservationInfo,
  plus 15 crate-level imports (agent_provider, cass, caut, config,
  ingest, mcp_framework, policy, runtime_compat, storage, workflows)
- mcp_missions.rs: replace use super::* with explicit imports of 7
  super types and 3 crate-level modules; same pattern for test module

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
